description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a combination of dark metal and wood textures. The stock, handguard, and pistol grip are rendered in a medium brown wood grain, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are finished in matte black metal. The rifle has a fixed wooden stock and a curved detachable magazine, typical of an AK-style firearm. The front sight post and rear sight are both visible, indicating the use of iron sights. The barrel is of standard length and does not appear to have any specialized muzzle device attached. The overall construction suggests a robust and utilitarian weapon suitable for urban environments.
description: A classic rifle with a wooden stock and grip, matte black metal receiver, and a curved detachable magazine. Features iron sights and a standard barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, pistol grip, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the wooden stock and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, grip, handguard, and the magazine's curvature, mirroring view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
